TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O masadakay i pitodohan a likat ato faedet ko lamal. Ano caay kalecad ko nitodohan, caay kalecad ko cengel ato likat no lamal. O lamal ko sapitangtang, sapingiro, sapilikat ato saparakat to kasoling. Ano mitodoh ko tamdaw to simal ato sikitang, masadak ko e-yang-hwa-tan . O nian ko sakafaedet no romi'ad no mita i matini.
S.PHON: o~u masa…¨~…ģakaj i pito~u…¨~…ģo~uńßan a …ĺikat ato~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt ko~u …ĺama…ĺ. ano~u ¶aaj ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u nito~u…¨~…ģo~uńßan, ¶aaj ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ ato~u …ĺikat no~u …ĺama…ĺ. o~u …ĺama…ĺ ko~u sapitaŇčtaŇč, sapiŇčiro~u, sapi…ĺikat ato~u saparakat to~u kaso~u…ĺiŇč. ano~u mito~u…¨~…ģo~uńß ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u sima…ĺ ato~u sikitaŇč, masa…¨~…ģak ko~u …ô-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan . o~u nian ko~u sakafa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u mita i matini.
S.FORM: O masadakay i pitodohan a likat ato faedet ko lamal. Ano caay kalecad ko nitodohan, caay kalecad ko cengel ato likat no lamal. O lamal ko sapitangtang, sapingiro, sapilikat ato saparakat to kasoling. Ano mitodoh ko tamdaw to simal ato sikitang, masadak ko e-yang-hwa-tan . O nian ko sakafaedet no romi'ad no mita i matini.
S.PHON: o~u masa…¨~…ģakaj i pito~u…¨~…ģo~uńßan a …ĺikat ato~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt ko~u …ĺama…ĺ. ano~u ¶aaj ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u nito~u…¨~…ģo~uńßan, ¶aaj ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ ato~u …ĺikat no~u …ĺama…ĺ. o~u …ĺama…ĺ ko~u sapitaŇčtaŇč, sapiŇčiro~u, sapi…ĺikat ato~u saparakat to~u kaso~u…ĺiŇč. ano~u mito~u…¨~…ģo~uńß ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u sima…ĺ ato~u sikitaŇč, masa…¨~…ģak ko~u …ô-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan . o~u nian ko~u sakafa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u mita i matini.
